sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me try clicking on the blue shape and see what happens
predict(expect_change=True, note='Click blue shape - track block changes')
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 35, 'col': 48}])

ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("=== Left blocks after clicking blue ===")
for r in range(18, 44):
    line = ascii_lines[r][7:22]
    if any(c not in 'c' for c in line):
        print(f"  {r}: {line}")

seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        b = n['boundary']
        r0, r1 = min(p[0] for p in b), max(p[0] for p in b)
        c0, c1 = min(p[1] for p in b), max(p[1] for p in b)
        print(f"\nLight green: [{r0}:{r1},{c0}:{c1}]")
    if n['color'] == 'Y':
        b = n['boundary']
        r0, r1 = min(p[0] for p in b), max(p[0] for p in b)
        c0, c1 = min(p[1] for p in b), max(p[1] for p in b)
        print(f"Yellow: [{r0}:{r1},{c0}:{c1}]")

print(f"\nLevel completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("=== Left blocks after clicking blue ===")
for r in range(18, 44):
    line = ascii_lines[r][7:22]
    if any(c not in 'c' for c in line):
        print(f"  {r}: {line}")

seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        b = n['boundary']
        r0, r1 = min(p[0] for p in b), max(p[0] for p in b)
        c0, c1 = min(p[1] for p in b), max(p[1] for p in b)
        print(f"\nLight green: [{r0}:{r1},{c0}:{c1}]")
    if n['color'] == 'Y':
        b = n['boundary']
        r0, r1 = min(p[0] for p in b), max(p[0] for p in b)
        c0, c1 = min(p[1] for p in b), max(p[1] for p in b)
        print(f"Yellow: [{r0}:{r1},{c0}:{c1}]")

print(f"\nLevel completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")
